style_a.name: 灰暗现实主义
style_a.prompt_suffix: handheld camera, film grain, desaturated cold tones, blue-grey color palette, urban isolation, dimly lit

style_b.name: 东方赛博神话
style_b.prompt_suffix: epic cyber mythology, golden and neon blue palette, weightless atmosphere, digital particles, majestic scale

music_sync.lyrics: [渐弱] 化作一道光 穿越云和海 / 落回平凡的世界 带着不凡的心

atmosphere.overall_mood: 从宇宙回归人间——流星划过天际，金色光芒洒落城市，两个世界融为一体
atmosphere.lighting: 宇宙星光→流星金光→城市晨光
atmosphere.weather: 太空→进入大气层→城市夜空

video_prompt: A golden winged warrior transforming into a meteor, descending through cosmos and clouds, golden light raining down on a grey city, fusion of both visual styles, warm return, 16:9, 15s.

bgm.description: 桥段到尾奏过渡，从高能逐渐回落，余韵悠长
bgm.instruments: 钢琴根音回归、弦乐轻柔铺底、电子氛围渐弱

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 宇宙中心——金翼战士悬浮在浩瀚星空中，X-WOW徽标在身后如星云

characters.name: 程序员
characters.action: 金甲展翅悬浮在星空中

storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 宇宙级的宁静——战斗结束后的片刻安宁
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: A golden winged cyber warrior floating peacefully in the vastness of space, surrounded by stars and nebulae, the X-WOW emblem glowing softly like a nebula behind them, serene and fulfilled, cosmic scale, post-battle calm, golden and deep space blue palette, cyber mythology, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 战士低头望向远方——看到地球一样的蓝色星球，那是现实世界

characters.name: 程序员
characters.action: 低头俯瞰远方的蓝色星球

storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: A golden winged warrior in space looking down at a distant blue planet glowing in the darkness, the figure positioned above with a contemplative downward gaze, longing to return home, cosmic perspective, golden armor reflecting the planet's blue light, poignant moment, cyber mythology meets humanity, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 战士收拢双翼——身体开始变成一团灼热的金色光球

characters.name: 程序员
characters.action: 双翼折叠包裹身体，全身化为金色流星

storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 从战士蜕变为一颗流星
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: A golden winged warrior folding their wings inward, body compressing and transforming into a blazing golden meteor, the armor dissolving into pure concentrated light, metamorphosis from humanoid to celestial projectile, space background, golden transformation, cyber mythology, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 金色流星冲向蓝色星球——穿越星域留下长长的金色尾迹
storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 流星归乡——穿越整个宇宙
storyboard_9grid.sfx: 流星划过太空的呼啸声
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: A blazing golden meteor streaking through space toward a blue planet, leaving a brilliant golden trail across the star field, passing through nebulae and cosmic dust, the tail stretching across the frame, dramatic speed and cosmic scale, homeward journey, golden and blue palette, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 流星进入大气层——与空气摩擦产生柔和的金橙色光晕
storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 穿越大气——两个世界的交界
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: A golden meteor entering the planet's atmosphere, creating a warm golden-orange atmospheric glow, passing through cloud layers that part around it, the transition from dark space to blue sky, golden re-entry trail, warm and hopeful, the grey city becoming visible below through the clouds, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: [风格融合] 流星划过城市上空——灰色城市的天际线被金色流星照亮

transition.description: AB风格融合——灰色城市 + 金色流星

storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 金色光芒照亮灰色世界——两种风格的美丽融合
storyboard_9grid.sfx: 流星划过+城市夜晚的环境音
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: A golden meteor streaking across the sky above a grey city skyline at night, the golden light illuminating the entire cityscape with warm golden tones, transforming the cold grey buildings with temporary golden warmth, two visual styles merging beautifully, grey city bathed in golden meteor light, fusion of reality and mythology, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 流星炸开——金色光粒子如雪花般缓缓飘落在城市上空

transition.description: 流星散为金色光粒子雨

storyboard_9grid.sfx: 粒子散落的轻柔声 + 风铃般的音效
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: A golden meteor burst dissolving into thousands of tiny golden light particles floating gently downward like golden snow over a city at night, warm golden dots drifting between grey buildings, ethereal and magical, the city bathed in soft golden glow, peaceful descent, beautiful fusion of grey reality and golden magic, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 城市街道上，行人不自觉地抬头望天——被飘落的金色光粒子吸引

characters.name: 程序员
characters.action: （尚未着陆，以光粒子形态散落）

storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 凡人们被金色光触动——每个人心中都有不凡
storyboard_9grid.sfx: 轻柔的城市夜音 + 温暖的弦乐
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: A city street at night with pedestrians stopping and looking upward in wonder, golden light particles gently floating down around them like magical snow, the golden dots reflecting in their eyes, ordinary people touched by something extraordinary, warm and hopeful atmosphere, grey city with golden magical elements, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 一颗金色光粒子缓缓飘入一间出租屋的窗户——那正是主角的房间

transition.description: 镜头缓缓推向窗户——引出最终段

storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 回到起点——一切故事的终点也是起点
storyboard_9grid.sfx: 窗户轻响 + 键盘轻敲声隐约响起
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: A single golden light particle drifting slowly toward a small apartment window at night, the window of a modest rental room visible with a faint blue computer screen glow inside, the golden particle about to enter through the gap, intimate framing, the camera slowly dollying toward the window, coming home, warm and melancholic, 16:9 aspect ratio
